_note: Per-keyword data is now from Amazon Advertising API v3 (live as of Apr 26). 7-day rolling spend still references SP-API Finances ProductAdsPaymentEventList because Ads API has only 1 day of pull history.

most_important_action_this_week.action: EXP-046 + EXP-047 + EXP-048 — execute the 3 PPC moves the Ads API just unlocked
most_important_action_this_week.why: Apr 26 Ads API confirms: rescue plan worked. Daily spend dropped from ~$71 (Finances avg) to $21.98 (Apr 26). Apr 26 ACoS = 44%, well under the 60% target. ONE keyword converted ($49.99 sales at 20.3% ACoS); ONE keyword consumed 46% of spend at 0% conversion. Surgical bid changes today + 5 missing keywords + filter campaign launch = next leg of compounding gains.
most_important_action_this_week.estimated_weekly_impact: Cut $10/day from bleeder while raising winner = ~$70/wk efficiency gain. New filter campaign + 5 new cat exacts = upside option.

ad_spend_analysis._billing_lag_note: Finances 7d still includes Apr 17-25 elevated billing window (pre-rescue). Apr 26 Ads API is the first clean per-keyword measurement.
